items.caption: A schematic diagram of a capillary gas chromatograph. the diagram includes a column, an oven, a detector, a valve, a pressure regulator, and a carrier gas. the column is labeled "column" and is connected to the oven, which is labeled "oven." the detector is connected to the column and is labeled "detector." the valve is connected to the detector and is labeled "valve." the pressure regulator is connected to the valve and is labeled "pressure regulator." the carrier gas is connected to the pressure regulator and is labeled "carrier gas." the diagram is set against a background with a blurred image of a plant, suggesting a natural or agricultural setting. the text "gc instrument" is visible at the top of the image, indicating that the diagram is related to a gas chromatograph. the overall style of the image is educational and informative, likely used for teaching or explaining the components of a capillary gas chromatograph.
